'''Teeda''' was an [[Empress/Legends|empress]] of the [[Regency Worlds/Legends|Arkanis Regency]] who [[Death/Legends|died]] long before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They had lovely [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. The [[Gender/Legends|empress]] was documented in the annals of the [[Arkanis/Legends|Arkanis]] Regency. The [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system's]] [[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Pii III]] and [[Pii IV]] were called "[[Teeda's Eyes]]" as a reference to Teeda's green eyes.<ref name="Greel" />

==Behind the scenes==
Teeda was first mentioned in "[[The Greel Wood Haven]]," an article written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and featured in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|sixth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] magazine that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] of [[1995]] for their ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Greel" />
